events.appearance_notes: Observed event; In an office, three men are working, and the man in plaid on the left stuffs something into his mouth.
events.event_text: From 0.0s to 6.2s, in an office, three men are working, and the man in plaid on the left stuffs something into his mouth.

events.appearance_notes: Observed event; Then the man in plaid clothes wiped his mouth with a paper towel. The man in gray clothes on the right stood up with a water cup in hand and walked upwards to talk to the man at the work station above.
events.event_text: From 6.2s to 22.1s, then the man in plaid clothes wiped his mouth with a paper towel. The man in gray clothes on the right stood up with a water cup in hand and walked upwards to talk to the man at the work station above.

events.appearance_notes: Observed event; The man in purple above gets up and leaves from the left door. The man in green is collecting water at the water fountain.
events.event_text: From 22.1s to 32.0s, the man in purple above gets up and leaves from the left door. The man in green is collecting water at the water fountain.

events.appearance_notes: Low activity; After receiving the water, the man in green looked up and drank water, then walked back to his work station and sat down. The man in purple walked back to his work station and sat down.
events.event_text: From 32.0s to 56.0s, after receiving the water, the man in green looked up and drank water, then walked back to his work station and sat down. The man in purple walked back to his work station and sat down.

events.appearance_notes: High activity; There is a woman in white working under the man in plaid. The man in plaid and the man in purple are talking and making movements with their hands from time to time.
events.event_text: From 56.0s to 65.3s, there is a woman in white working under the man in plaid. The man in plaid and the man in purple are talking and making movements with their hands from time to time.

events.appearance_notes: Observed event; Then the man in plaid took a sip of water and put his hands down to continue working. A man in black came from the right and talked with the man in gray at the work station on the right.
events.event_text: From 65.3s to 88.1s, then the man in plaid took a sip of water and put his hands down to continue working. A man in black came from the right and talked with the man in gray at the work station on the right.

events.appearance_notes: Observed event; The man in black picked up the water cup and drank water, then left the camera's field of view.
events.event_text: From 88.1s to 105.0s, the man in black picked up the water cup and drank water, then left the camera's field of view.

events.appearance_notes: Observed event; The man in purple stood up and walked to the right, then opened the door and left the office.
events.event_text: From 105.0s to 127.2s, the man in purple stood up and walked to the right, then opened the door and left the office.

events.appearance_notes: Observed event; The man in purple entered the office and returned to his workstation to continue working.
events.event_text: From 127.2s to 155.4s, the man in purple entered the office and returned to his workstation to continue working.

events.appearance_notes: Observed event; The man in black walked into the office again, drank water and talked with the man in purple, then returned to the workstation next to the man in gray and sat down.
events.event_text: From 155.4s to 196.0s, the man in black walked into the office again, drank water and talked with the man in purple, then returned to the workstation next to the man in gray and sat down.

events.appearance_notes: High activity; The woman in white got up and came to the man in purple to talk to him, then returned to her workstation with the food.
events.event_text: From 196.0s to 233.1s, the woman in white got up and came to the man in purple to talk to him, then returned to her workstation with the food.
